calendar.matters:
Court'S Motion To Dismiss Appeal
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kimberly Rodden is present.
Attorney Wendy Sullivan representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of JAN-17-2012 is vacated.
